canonical_definition: Metric Calculating Benchmark, a code-verifiable evaluation suite that tests LLMs on their ability to follow complex step-by-step rubrics for computing string-matching NLP metrics, with objective assessment via parallel reference code.
papers: DSVD: Dynamic Self-Verify Decoding for Faithful Generation in Large Language Models

definitions.text: Metric Calculating Benchmark, a code-verifiable evaluation suite that tests LLMs on their ability to follow complex step-by-step rubrics for computing string-matching NLP metrics, with objective assessment via parallel reference code.
definitions.paper: DSVD: Dynamic Self-Verify Decoding for Faithful Generation in Large Language Models

definitions.text: A benchmark designed to evaluate large language models on their ability to follow complex instructions, where correctness can be verified programmatically.

relationships.paper: DSVD: Dynamic Self-Verify Decoding for Faithful Generation in Large Language Models
relationships.evidence: MCBench evaluates three key capabilities of LLMs: • Complex Instruction Following: Each prompt in MCBench consists of multi-step instructions averaging over 5,000 characters in length.
